reasoning: As of the knowledge cutoff date (May 5, 2025), Chegg has cleared its most significant financial hurdle by paying off $358.9 million in convertible notes that matured on March 15, 2025. Following this repayment and additional repurchases of its 2026 debt, Chegg maintains a 'net cash' position (cash exceeds total debt) and has guided for positive Adjusted EBITDA in Q1 2025. With its next debt maturity not until 2026 and an earnings call scheduled for May 12, 2025, there is no immediate liquidity trigger or insolvency risk that would necessitate a bankruptcy filing before July 1, 2025.
